summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.kernel; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.selfdev.GitManager; public class DefaultBranchManager implements BranchManager { private final GitManager gitManager; public DefaultBranchManager(GitManager gitManager) { this.gitManager = gitManager; } @Override public void provisionBranch(String base, String newBranch) throws Exception { gitManager.createBranchFrom(base, newBranch); } @Override public void createWorktree(String branch, String path) throws Exception { gitManager.createWorktree(branch, path); } @Override public void removeWorktree(String path) throws Exception { gitManager.removeWorktree(path); } @Override
